raw_consumer_statement:
Dispute XXXX Regarding this dispute, I would like to sincerely express my feelings. 

The bracelet was not in the package I received. Since I received the package on XX/XX/XXXX, it was meant to be a XXXXXXXX XXXX gift, and I planned to give it to my wife on XX/XX/XXXX. However, when we opened the package, there was no bracelet inside. I immediately contacted XXXX to request a return. On XX/XX/XXXX, I returned the package After reviewing the delivery confirmation provided by XXXX, I found that the person who signed for the package was not me. BTWI have confirmed with XXXX  that the person who signed for the package used a driver 's license. Only I have a driver 's license in our householdmy wife doesnt have a driver 's license. 

Later, because I returned to my home country, the dispute has been dealt with intermittently for some time. I have kept the evidence, filed a police report, and received the report as well. Once again, I hope American Express can process my request. Thank you.
